text:
- #30 X-Ray Feed: developer overlay showing live relay-subscription reconciliation with causes — the Chirp-side diagnostics pane; open, no epic label [...] **chirp#30** — OPEN. Labels: enhancement. Proposes an "X-Ray Feed" developer overlay showing live relay-subscription reconciliation with causal chains, staged in three phases: v0 "Shadow X-Ray" (buildable now, visualizes NMP's discarded shadow ResourcePlan next to legacy behavior — now stale since #2808 already promoted shadow to authority), v1 "Authority X-Ray" (real applied commands with causal chains, gated on #2808 — now closed/done), v2 "Time travel" (record + scrub a session trace, gated on trellis#114 — now closed/done — and NMP#2809). Explicitly out of scope: metrics/dashboards/log views, receipts only. No comments. [...] **The big finding that reshapes the plan:** every single upstream prerequisite is already closed. Trellis #114 (serializable traces, via PR #141), #122 (typed keys), #125 (bounded audit retention), #126 (scope reclamation) — all done. And NMP #2808 (shadow → authority promotion) merged *today* via PR #2832. Two consequences:

1. **Chirp #30's v0 "Shadow X-Ray" is obsolete** — there's no shadow plan to visualize anymore. Skip straight to v1 authority receipts.
2. **Nothing blocks NMP #2809 except the ADR decision itself.** The remaining work is entirely NMP + Chirp; Trellis needs nothing new. [...] - **Phase D — Chirp X-Ray pane** (chirp#30 v1): dev-build-only declared projection/devtools channel; Chirp renders, never parses.
